## What & why
<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Type
- [ ] New / updated risk rule
- [ ] New / updated adapter
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Checklist
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] No write/mutation calls to any vendor API (read-only is non-negotiable)
- [ ] New rules include rationale + remediation + references (+ mitre where relevant)
- [ ] Does not flag the known-good demo exclusion (`demo-005`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new behavior
- [ ] Docs updated if config or behavior changed
